---
title: "Stock Indices Interactive Charts"
format:
  html:
    theme: [cosmo, theme.scss]
    page-layout: full
    self-contained: false
---

<head>
  <meta name="description" content="Interactive charting for multiple stock indices on a single scrollable page.">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;600&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
</head>

<body>

## Apple Inc. (AAPL)

::: {.column-screen}
<div id="chart-container-aapl" class="chart-wrapper">
<div class="chart-toolbar">
<div class="toolbar-left">
<span class="ticker-badge">AAPL</span>
<span class="ticker-title">Apple Inc.</span>
<span class="divider">|</span>
<div class="indicator-buttons">
<button class="tool-btn active" id="btn-sma-aapl" onclick="toggleIndicators('sma', 'aapl')">SMA Lines</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-bb-aapl" onclick="toggleIndicators('bb', 'aapl')">Bollinger Bands</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-all-aapl" onclick="toggleIndicators('all', 'aapl')">Show All</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-clear-aapl" onclick="toggleIndicators('clear', 'aapl')">Price Only</button>
</div>
</div>
<button id="fullscreen-btn-aapl" onclick="toggleFullscreen('aapl')">⛶ Full Screen</button>
</div>

```{python}
#| label: chart-aapl
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# Load dataset
df_aapl = pd.read_csv("../downloads/aapl_enriched.csv")
df_aapl['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_aapl['date'])

# Create subplots
fig_aapl = make_subplots(
    rows=2, cols=1, 
    shared_xaxes=True, 
    vertical_spacing=0.03,
    subplot_titles=('Price & Technical Indicators', 'Volume'),
    row_width=[0.2, 0.8]
)

colors_aapl = ['#26a69a' if row['close'] >= row['open'] else '#ef5350' for _, row in df_aapl.iterrows()]

# 1. Candlestick
fig_aapl.add_trace(
    go.Candlestick(
        x=df_aapl['date'], open=df_aapl['open'], high=df_aapl['high'], low=df_aapl['low'], close=df_aapl['close'],
        name='AAPL Price', increasing_line_color='#26a69a', decreasing_line_color='#ef5350',
        increasing_fillcolor='#26a69a', decreasing_fillcolor='#ef5350', showlegend=True
    ), row=1, col=1
)

# 2. SMAs
fig_aapl.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_aapl['date'], y=df_aapl['sma_20'], line=dict(color='#2962ff', width=1.5), name='SMA 20', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_aapl.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_aapl['date'], y=df_aapl['sma_50'], line=dict(color='#ff9800', width=1.5), name='SMA 50', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_aapl.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_aapl['date'], y=df_aapl['sma_200'], line=dict(color='#e040fb', width=1.5), name='SMA 200', visible=True), row=1, col=1)

# 3. Bollinger Bands
fig_aapl.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_aapl['date'], y=df_aapl['bb_upper'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), name='BB Upper', visible=False), row=1, col=1)
fig_aapl.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_aapl['date'], y=df_aapl['bb_lower'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), fill='tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.05)', name='BB Lower', visible=False), row=1, col=1)

# 4. Volume
fig_aapl.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_aapl['date'], y=df_aapl['volume'], name='Volume', marker=dict(color=colors_aapl, line=dict(width=0)), opacity=1.0, showlegend=False), row=2, col=1)

fig_aapl.update_layout(
    template='plotly_dark', paper_bgcolor='#0c101b', plot_bgcolor='#0c101b', autosize=True, dragmode='pan', margin=dict(t=45, b=40, l=60, r=40),
    xaxis=dict(
        rangeslider=dict(visible=False),
        rangeselector=dict(
            buttons=list([
                dict(count=1, label="1M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=3, label="3M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=6, label="6M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=1, label="1Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=5, label="5Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(step="all", label="MAX")
            ]),
            bgcolor='#141824', activecolor='#2962ff', font=dict(color='#d1d4dc', size=11), bordercolor='#202637', borderwidth=1
        )
    ),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', tickprefix='$', title='Price (USD)', fixedrange=True),
    yaxis2=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', title='Volume', fixedrange=True),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='right', x=1, bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)')
)
fig_aapl.update_xaxes(minallowed='2010-06-15', maxallowed='2026-07-05')
fig_aapl.show(config={'scrollZoom': True})
```

</div>
:::

<hr/>


## Starbucks Corporation (SBUX)

::: {.column-screen}
<div id="chart-container-sbux" class="chart-wrapper">
<div class="chart-toolbar">
<div class="toolbar-left">
<span class="ticker-badge">SBUX</span>
<span class="ticker-title">Starbucks Corporation</span>
<span class="divider">|</span>
<div class="indicator-buttons">
<button class="tool-btn active" id="btn-sma-sbux" onclick="toggleIndicators('sma', 'sbux')">SMA Lines</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-bb-sbux" onclick="toggleIndicators('bb', 'sbux')">Bollinger Bands</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-all-sbux" onclick="toggleIndicators('all', 'sbux')">Show All</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-clear-sbux" onclick="toggleIndicators('clear', 'sbux')">Price Only</button>
</div>
</div>
<button id="fullscreen-btn-sbux" onclick="toggleFullscreen('sbux')">⛶ Full Screen</button>
</div>

```{python}
#| label: chart-sbux
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# Load dataset
df_sbux = pd.read_csv("../downloads/sbux_enriched.csv")
df_sbux['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_sbux['date'])

# Create subplots
fig_sbux = make_subplots(
    rows=2, cols=1, 
    shared_xaxes=True, 
    vertical_spacing=0.03,
    subplot_titles=('Price & Technical Indicators', 'Volume'),
    row_width=[0.2, 0.8]
)

colors_sbux = ['#26a69a' if row['close'] >= row['open'] else '#ef5350' for _, row in df_sbux.iterrows()]

# 1. Candlestick
fig_sbux.add_trace(
    go.Candlestick(
        x=df_sbux['date'], open=df_sbux['open'], high=df_sbux['high'], low=df_sbux['low'], close=df_sbux['close'],
        name='SBUX Price', increasing_line_color='#26a69a', decreasing_line_color='#ef5350',
        increasing_fillcolor='#26a69a', decreasing_fillcolor='#ef5350', showlegend=True
    ), row=1, col=1
)

# 2. SMAs
fig_sbux.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_sbux['date'], y=df_sbux['sma_20'], line=dict(color='#2962ff', width=1.5), name='SMA 20', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_sbux.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_sbux['date'], y=df_sbux['sma_50'], line=dict(color='#ff9800', width=1.5), name='SMA 50', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_sbux.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_sbux['date'], y=df_sbux['sma_200'], line=dict(color='#e040fb', width=1.5), name='SMA 200', visible=True), row=1, col=1)

# 3. Bollinger Bands
fig_sbux.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_sbux['date'], y=df_sbux['bb_upper'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), name='BB Upper', visible=False), row=1, col=1)
fig_sbux.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_sbux['date'], y=df_sbux['bb_lower'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), fill='tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.05)', name='BB Lower', visible=False), row=1, col=1)

# 4. Volume
fig_sbux.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_sbux['date'], y=df_sbux['volume'], name='Volume', marker=dict(color=colors_sbux, line=dict(width=0)), opacity=1.0, showlegend=False), row=2, col=1)

fig_sbux.update_layout(
    template='plotly_dark', paper_bgcolor='#0c101b', plot_bgcolor='#0c101b', autosize=True, dragmode='pan', margin=dict(t=45, b=40, l=60, r=40),
    xaxis=dict(
        rangeslider=dict(visible=False),
        rangeselector=dict(
            buttons=list([
                dict(count=1, label="1M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=3, label="3M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=6, label="6M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=1, label="1Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=5, label="5Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(step="all", label="MAX")
            ]),
            bgcolor='#141824', activecolor='#2962ff', font=dict(color='#d1d4dc', size=11), bordercolor='#202637', borderwidth=1
        )
    ),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', tickprefix='$', title='Price (USD)', fixedrange=True),
    yaxis2=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', title='Volume', fixedrange=True),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='right', x=1, bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)')
)
fig_sbux.update_xaxes(minallowed='2010-06-15', maxallowed='2026-07-05')
fig_sbux.show(config={'scrollZoom': True})
```

</div>
:::

<hr/>


## Microsoft Corporation (MSFT)

::: {.column-screen}
<div id="chart-container-msft" class="chart-wrapper">
<div class="chart-toolbar">
<div class="toolbar-left">
<span class="ticker-badge">MSFT</span>
<span class="ticker-title">Microsoft Corporation</span>
<span class="divider">|</span>
<div class="indicator-buttons">
<button class="tool-btn active" id="btn-sma-msft" onclick="toggleIndicators('sma', 'msft')">SMA Lines</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-bb-msft" onclick="toggleIndicators('bb', 'msft')">Bollinger Bands</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-all-msft" onclick="toggleIndicators('all', 'msft')">Show All</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-clear-msft" onclick="toggleIndicators('clear', 'msft')">Price Only</button>
</div>
</div>
<button id="fullscreen-btn-msft" onclick="toggleFullscreen('msft')">⛶ Full Screen</button>
</div>

```{python}
#| label: chart-msft
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# Load dataset
df_msft = pd.read_csv("../downloads/msft_enriched.csv")
df_msft['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_msft['date'])

# Create subplots
fig_msft = make_subplots(
    rows=2, cols=1, 
    shared_xaxes=True, 
    vertical_spacing=0.03,
    subplot_titles=('Price & Technical Indicators', 'Volume'),
    row_width=[0.2, 0.8]
)

colors_msft = ['#26a69a' if row['close'] >= row['open'] else '#ef5350' for _, row in df_msft.iterrows()]

# 1. Candlestick
fig_msft.add_trace(
    go.Candlestick(
        x=df_msft['date'], open=df_msft['open'], high=df_msft['high'], low=df_msft['low'], close=df_msft['close'],
        name='MSFT Price', increasing_line_color='#26a69a', decreasing_line_color='#ef5350',
        increasing_fillcolor='#26a69a', decreasing_fillcolor='#ef5350', showlegend=True
    ), row=1, col=1
)

# 2. SMAs
fig_msft.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_msft['date'], y=df_msft['sma_20'], line=dict(color='#2962ff', width=1.5), name='SMA 20', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_msft.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_msft['date'], y=df_msft['sma_50'], line=dict(color='#ff9800', width=1.5), name='SMA 50', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_msft.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_msft['date'], y=df_msft['sma_200'], line=dict(color='#e040fb', width=1.5), name='SMA 200', visible=True), row=1, col=1)

# 3. Bollinger Bands
fig_msft.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_msft['date'], y=df_msft['bb_upper'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), name='BB Upper', visible=False), row=1, col=1)
fig_msft.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_msft['date'], y=df_msft['bb_lower'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), fill='tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.05)', name='BB Lower', visible=False), row=1, col=1)

# 4. Volume
fig_msft.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_msft['date'], y=df_msft['volume'], name='Volume', marker=dict(color=colors_msft, line=dict(width=0)), opacity=1.0, showlegend=False), row=2, col=1)

fig_msft.update_layout(
    template='plotly_dark', paper_bgcolor='#0c101b', plot_bgcolor='#0c101b', autosize=True, dragmode='pan', margin=dict(t=45, b=40, l=60, r=40),
    xaxis=dict(
        rangeslider=dict(visible=False),
        rangeselector=dict(
            buttons=list([
                dict(count=1, label="1M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=3, label="3M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=6, label="6M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=1, label="1Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=5, label="5Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(step="all", label="MAX")
            ]),
            bgcolor='#141824', activecolor='#2962ff', font=dict(color='#d1d4dc', size=11), bordercolor='#202637', borderwidth=1
        )
    ),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', tickprefix='$', title='Price (USD)', fixedrange=True),
    yaxis2=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', title='Volume', fixedrange=True),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='right', x=1, bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)')
)
fig_msft.update_xaxes(minallowed='2010-06-15', maxallowed='2026-07-05')
fig_msft.show(config={'scrollZoom': True})
```

</div>
:::

<hr/>


## Cisco Systems, Inc. (CSCO)

::: {.column-screen}
<div id="chart-container-csco" class="chart-wrapper">
<div class="chart-toolbar">
<div class="toolbar-left">
<span class="ticker-badge">CSCO</span>
<span class="ticker-title">Cisco Systems, Inc.</span>
<span class="divider">|</span>
<div class="indicator-buttons">
<button class="tool-btn active" id="btn-sma-csco" onclick="toggleIndicators('sma', 'csco')">SMA Lines</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-bb-csco" onclick="toggleIndicators('bb', 'csco')">Bollinger Bands</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-all-csco" onclick="toggleIndicators('all', 'csco')">Show All</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-clear-csco" onclick="toggleIndicators('clear', 'csco')">Price Only</button>
</div>
</div>
<button id="fullscreen-btn-csco" onclick="toggleFullscreen('csco')">⛶ Full Screen</button>
</div>

```{python}
#| label: chart-csco
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# Load dataset
df_csco = pd.read_csv("../downloads/csco_enriched.csv")
df_csco['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_csco['date'])

# Create subplots
fig_csco = make_subplots(
    rows=2, cols=1, 
    shared_xaxes=True, 
    vertical_spacing=0.03,
    subplot_titles=('Price & Technical Indicators', 'Volume'),
    row_width=[0.2, 0.8]
)

colors_csco = ['#26a69a' if row['close'] >= row['open'] else '#ef5350' for _, row in df_csco.iterrows()]

# 1. Candlestick
fig_csco.add_trace(
    go.Candlestick(
        x=df_csco['date'], open=df_csco['open'], high=df_csco['high'], low=df_csco['low'], close=df_csco['close'],
        name='CSCO Price', increasing_line_color='#26a69a', decreasing_line_color='#ef5350',
        increasing_fillcolor='#26a69a', decreasing_fillcolor='#ef5350', showlegend=True
    ), row=1, col=1
)

# 2. SMAs
fig_csco.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_csco['date'], y=df_csco['sma_20'], line=dict(color='#2962ff', width=1.5), name='SMA 20', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_csco.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_csco['date'], y=df_csco['sma_50'], line=dict(color='#ff9800', width=1.5), name='SMA 50', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_csco.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_csco['date'], y=df_csco['sma_200'], line=dict(color='#e040fb', width=1.5), name='SMA 200', visible=True), row=1, col=1)

# 3. Bollinger Bands
fig_csco.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_csco['date'], y=df_csco['bb_upper'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), name='BB Upper', visible=False), row=1, col=1)
fig_csco.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_csco['date'], y=df_csco['bb_lower'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), fill='tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.05)', name='BB Lower', visible=False), row=1, col=1)

# 4. Volume
fig_csco.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_csco['date'], y=df_csco['volume'], name='Volume', marker=dict(color=colors_csco, line=dict(width=0)), opacity=1.0, showlegend=False), row=2, col=1)

fig_csco.update_layout(
    template='plotly_dark', paper_bgcolor='#0c101b', plot_bgcolor='#0c101b', autosize=True, dragmode='pan', margin=dict(t=45, b=40, l=60, r=40),
    xaxis=dict(
        rangeslider=dict(visible=False),
        rangeselector=dict(
            buttons=list([
                dict(count=1, label="1M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=3, label="3M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=6, label="6M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=1, label="1Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=5, label="5Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(step="all", label="MAX")
            ]),
            bgcolor='#141824', activecolor='#2962ff', font=dict(color='#d1d4dc', size=11), bordercolor='#202637', borderwidth=1
        )
    ),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', tickprefix='$', title='Price (USD)', fixedrange=True),
    yaxis2=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', title='Volume', fixedrange=True),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='right', x=1, bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)')
)
fig_csco.update_xaxes(minallowed='2010-06-15', maxallowed='2026-07-05')
fig_csco.show(config={'scrollZoom': True})
```

</div>
:::

<hr/>


## QUALCOMM Incorporated (QCOM)

::: {.column-screen}
<div id="chart-container-qcom" class="chart-wrapper">
<div class="chart-toolbar">
<div class="toolbar-left">
<span class="ticker-badge">QCOM</span>
<span class="ticker-title">QUALCOMM Incorporated</span>
<span class="divider">|</span>
<div class="indicator-buttons">
<button class="tool-btn active" id="btn-sma-qcom" onclick="toggleIndicators('sma', 'qcom')">SMA Lines</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-bb-qcom" onclick="toggleIndicators('bb', 'qcom')">Bollinger Bands</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-all-qcom" onclick="toggleIndicators('all', 'qcom')">Show All</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-clear-qcom" onclick="toggleIndicators('clear', 'qcom')">Price Only</button>
</div>
</div>
<button id="fullscreen-btn-qcom" onclick="toggleFullscreen('qcom')">⛶ Full Screen</button>
</div>

```{python}
#| label: chart-qcom
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# Load dataset
df_qcom = pd.read_csv("../downloads/qcom_enriched.csv")
df_qcom['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_qcom['date'])

# Create subplots
fig_qcom = make_subplots(
    rows=2, cols=1, 
    shared_xaxes=True, 
    vertical_spacing=0.03,
    subplot_titles=('Price & Technical Indicators', 'Volume'),
    row_width=[0.2, 0.8]
)

colors_qcom = ['#26a69a' if row['close'] >= row['open'] else '#ef5350' for _, row in df_qcom.iterrows()]

# 1. Candlestick
fig_qcom.add_trace(
    go.Candlestick(
        x=df_qcom['date'], open=df_qcom['open'], high=df_qcom['high'], low=df_qcom['low'], close=df_qcom['close'],
        name='QCOM Price', increasing_line_color='#26a69a', decreasing_line_color='#ef5350',
        increasing_fillcolor='#26a69a', decreasing_fillcolor='#ef5350', showlegend=True
    ), row=1, col=1
)

# 2. SMAs
fig_qcom.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_qcom['date'], y=df_qcom['sma_20'], line=dict(color='#2962ff', width=1.5), name='SMA 20', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_qcom.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_qcom['date'], y=df_qcom['sma_50'], line=dict(color='#ff9800', width=1.5), name='SMA 50', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_qcom.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_qcom['date'], y=df_qcom['sma_200'], line=dict(color='#e040fb', width=1.5), name='SMA 200', visible=True), row=1, col=1)

# 3. Bollinger Bands
fig_qcom.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_qcom['date'], y=df_qcom['bb_upper'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), name='BB Upper', visible=False), row=1, col=1)
fig_qcom.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_qcom['date'], y=df_qcom['bb_lower'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), fill='tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.05)', name='BB Lower', visible=False), row=1, col=1)

# 4. Volume
fig_qcom.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_qcom['date'], y=df_qcom['volume'], name='Volume', marker=dict(color=colors_qcom, line=dict(width=0)), opacity=1.0, showlegend=False), row=2, col=1)

fig_qcom.update_layout(
    template='plotly_dark', paper_bgcolor='#0c101b', plot_bgcolor='#0c101b', autosize=True, dragmode='pan', margin=dict(t=45, b=40, l=60, r=40),
    xaxis=dict(
        rangeslider=dict(visible=False),
        rangeselector=dict(
            buttons=list([
                dict(count=1, label="1M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=3, label="3M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=6, label="6M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=1, label="1Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=5, label="5Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(step="all", label="MAX")
            ]),
            bgcolor='#141824', activecolor='#2962ff', font=dict(color='#d1d4dc', size=11), bordercolor='#202637', borderwidth=1
        )
    ),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', tickprefix='$', title='Price (USD)', fixedrange=True),
    yaxis2=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', title='Volume', fixedrange=True),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='right', x=1, bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)')
)
fig_qcom.update_xaxes(minallowed='2010-06-15', maxallowed='2026-07-05')
fig_qcom.show(config={'scrollZoom': True})
```

</div>
:::

<hr/>


## Meta Platforms, Inc. (META)

::: {.column-screen}
<div id="chart-container-meta" class="chart-wrapper">
<div class="chart-toolbar">
<div class="toolbar-left">
<span class="ticker-badge">META</span>
<span class="ticker-title">Meta Platforms, Inc.</span>
<span class="divider">|</span>
<div class="indicator-buttons">
<button class="tool-btn active" id="btn-sma-meta" onclick="toggleIndicators('sma', 'meta')">SMA Lines</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-bb-meta" onclick="toggleIndicators('bb', 'meta')">Bollinger Bands</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-all-meta" onclick="toggleIndicators('all', 'meta')">Show All</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-clear-meta" onclick="toggleIndicators('clear', 'meta')">Price Only</button>
</div>
</div>
<button id="fullscreen-btn-meta" onclick="toggleFullscreen('meta')">⛶ Full Screen</button>
</div>

```{python}
#| label: chart-meta
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# Load dataset
df_meta = pd.read_csv("../downloads/meta_enriched.csv")
df_meta['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_meta['date'])

# Create subplots
fig_meta = make_subplots(
    rows=2, cols=1, 
    shared_xaxes=True, 
    vertical_spacing=0.03,
    subplot_titles=('Price & Technical Indicators', 'Volume'),
    row_width=[0.2, 0.8]
)

colors_meta = ['#26a69a' if row['close'] >= row['open'] else '#ef5350' for _, row in df_meta.iterrows()]

# 1. Candlestick
fig_meta.add_trace(
    go.Candlestick(
        x=df_meta['date'], open=df_meta['open'], high=df_meta['high'], low=df_meta['low'], close=df_meta['close'],
        name='META Price', increasing_line_color='#26a69a', decreasing_line_color='#ef5350',
        increasing_fillcolor='#26a69a', decreasing_fillcolor='#ef5350', showlegend=True
    ), row=1, col=1
)

# 2. SMAs
fig_meta.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_meta['date'], y=df_meta['sma_20'], line=dict(color='#2962ff', width=1.5), name='SMA 20', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_meta.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_meta['date'], y=df_meta['sma_50'], line=dict(color='#ff9800', width=1.5), name='SMA 50', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_meta.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_meta['date'], y=df_meta['sma_200'], line=dict(color='#e040fb', width=1.5), name='SMA 200', visible=True), row=1, col=1)

# 3. Bollinger Bands
fig_meta.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_meta['date'], y=df_meta['bb_upper'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), name='BB Upper', visible=False), row=1, col=1)
fig_meta.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_meta['date'], y=df_meta['bb_lower'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), fill='tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.05)', name='BB Lower', visible=False), row=1, col=1)

# 4. Volume
fig_meta.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_meta['date'], y=df_meta['volume'], name='Volume', marker=dict(color=colors_meta, line=dict(width=0)), opacity=1.0, showlegend=False), row=2, col=1)

fig_meta.update_layout(
    template='plotly_dark', paper_bgcolor='#0c101b', plot_bgcolor='#0c101b', autosize=True, dragmode='pan', margin=dict(t=45, b=40, l=60, r=40),
    xaxis=dict(
        rangeslider=dict(visible=False),
        rangeselector=dict(
            buttons=list([
                dict(count=1, label="1M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=3, label="3M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=6, label="6M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=1, label="1Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=5, label="5Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(step="all", label="MAX")
            ]),
            bgcolor='#141824', activecolor='#2962ff', font=dict(color='#d1d4dc', size=11), bordercolor='#202637', borderwidth=1
        )
    ),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', tickprefix='$', title='Price (USD)', fixedrange=True),
    yaxis2=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', title='Volume', fixedrange=True),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='right', x=1, bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)')
)
fig_meta.update_xaxes(minallowed='2010-06-15', maxallowed='2026-07-05')
fig_meta.show(config={'scrollZoom': True})
```

</div>
:::

<hr/>


## Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN)

::: {.column-screen}
<div id="chart-container-amzn" class="chart-wrapper">
<div class="chart-toolbar">
<div class="toolbar-left">
<span class="ticker-badge">AMZN</span>
<span class="ticker-title">Amazon.com, Inc.</span>
<span class="divider">|</span>
<div class="indicator-buttons">
<button class="tool-btn active" id="btn-sma-amzn" onclick="toggleIndicators('sma', 'amzn')">SMA Lines</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-bb-amzn" onclick="toggleIndicators('bb', 'amzn')">Bollinger Bands</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-all-amzn" onclick="toggleIndicators('all', 'amzn')">Show All</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-clear-amzn" onclick="toggleIndicators('clear', 'amzn')">Price Only</button>
</div>
</div>
<button id="fullscreen-btn-amzn" onclick="toggleFullscreen('amzn')">⛶ Full Screen</button>
</div>

```{python}
#| label: chart-amzn
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# Load dataset
df_amzn = pd.read_csv("../downloads/amzn_enriched.csv")
df_amzn['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_amzn['date'])

# Create subplots
fig_amzn = make_subplots(
    rows=2, cols=1, 
    shared_xaxes=True, 
    vertical_spacing=0.03,
    subplot_titles=('Price & Technical Indicators', 'Volume'),
    row_width=[0.2, 0.8]
)

colors_amzn = ['#26a69a' if row['close'] >= row['open'] else '#ef5350' for _, row in df_amzn.iterrows()]

# 1. Candlestick
fig_amzn.add_trace(
    go.Candlestick(
        x=df_amzn['date'], open=df_amzn['open'], high=df_amzn['high'], low=df_amzn['low'], close=df_amzn['close'],
        name='AMZN Price', increasing_line_color='#26a69a', decreasing_line_color='#ef5350',
        increasing_fillcolor='#26a69a', decreasing_fillcolor='#ef5350', showlegend=True
    ), row=1, col=1
)

# 2. SMAs
fig_amzn.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_amzn['date'], y=df_amzn['sma_20'], line=dict(color='#2962ff', width=1.5), name='SMA 20', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_amzn.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_amzn['date'], y=df_amzn['sma_50'], line=dict(color='#ff9800', width=1.5), name='SMA 50', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_amzn.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_amzn['date'], y=df_amzn['sma_200'], line=dict(color='#e040fb', width=1.5), name='SMA 200', visible=True), row=1, col=1)

# 3. Bollinger Bands
fig_amzn.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_amzn['date'], y=df_amzn['bb_upper'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), name='BB Upper', visible=False), row=1, col=1)
fig_amzn.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_amzn['date'], y=df_amzn['bb_lower'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), fill='tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.05)', name='BB Lower', visible=False), row=1, col=1)

# 4. Volume
fig_amzn.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_amzn['date'], y=df_amzn['volume'], name='Volume', marker=dict(color=colors_amzn, line=dict(width=0)), opacity=1.0, showlegend=False), row=2, col=1)

fig_amzn.update_layout(
    template='plotly_dark', paper_bgcolor='#0c101b', plot_bgcolor='#0c101b', autosize=True, dragmode='pan', margin=dict(t=45, b=40, l=60, r=40),
    xaxis=dict(
        rangeslider=dict(visible=False),
        rangeselector=dict(
            buttons=list([
                dict(count=1, label="1M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=3, label="3M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=6, label="6M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=1, label="1Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=5, label="5Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(step="all", label="MAX")
            ]),
            bgcolor='#141824', activecolor='#2962ff', font=dict(color='#d1d4dc', size=11), bordercolor='#202637', borderwidth=1
        )
    ),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', tickprefix='$', title='Price (USD)', fixedrange=True),
    yaxis2=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', title='Volume', fixedrange=True),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='right', x=1, bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)')
)
fig_amzn.update_xaxes(minallowed='2010-06-15', maxallowed='2026-07-05')
fig_amzn.show(config={'scrollZoom': True})
```

</div>
:::

<hr/>


## Tesla, Inc. (TSLA)

::: {.column-screen}
<div id="chart-container-tsla" class="chart-wrapper">
<div class="chart-toolbar">
<div class="toolbar-left">
<span class="ticker-badge">TSLA</span>
<span class="ticker-title">Tesla, Inc.</span>
<span class="divider">|</span>
<div class="indicator-buttons">
<button class="tool-btn active" id="btn-sma-tsla" onclick="toggleIndicators('sma', 'tsla')">SMA Lines</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-bb-tsla" onclick="toggleIndicators('bb', 'tsla')">Bollinger Bands</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-all-tsla" onclick="toggleIndicators('all', 'tsla')">Show All</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-clear-tsla" onclick="toggleIndicators('clear', 'tsla')">Price Only</button>
</div>
</div>
<button id="fullscreen-btn-tsla" onclick="toggleFullscreen('tsla')">⛶ Full Screen</button>
</div>

```{python}
#| label: chart-tsla
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# Load dataset
df_tsla = pd.read_csv("../downloads/tsla_enriched.csv")
df_tsla['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_tsla['date'])

# Create subplots
fig_tsla = make_subplots(
    rows=2, cols=1, 
    shared_xaxes=True, 
    vertical_spacing=0.03,
    subplot_titles=('Price & Technical Indicators', 'Volume'),
    row_width=[0.2, 0.8]
)

colors_tsla = ['#26a69a' if row['close'] >= row['open'] else '#ef5350' for _, row in df_tsla.iterrows()]

# 1. Candlestick
fig_tsla.add_trace(
    go.Candlestick(
        x=df_tsla['date'], open=df_tsla['open'], high=df_tsla['high'], low=df_tsla['low'], close=df_tsla['close'],
        name='TSLA Price', increasing_line_color='#26a69a', decreasing_line_color='#ef5350',
        increasing_fillcolor='#26a69a', decreasing_fillcolor='#ef5350', showlegend=True
    ), row=1, col=1
)

# 2. SMAs
fig_tsla.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_tsla['date'], y=df_tsla['sma_20'], line=dict(color='#2962ff', width=1.5), name='SMA 20', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_tsla.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_tsla['date'], y=df_tsla['sma_50'], line=dict(color='#ff9800', width=1.5), name='SMA 50', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_tsla.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_tsla['date'], y=df_tsla['sma_200'], line=dict(color='#e040fb', width=1.5), name='SMA 200', visible=True), row=1, col=1)

# 3. Bollinger Bands
fig_tsla.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_tsla['date'], y=df_tsla['bb_upper'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), name='BB Upper', visible=False), row=1, col=1)
fig_tsla.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_tsla['date'], y=df_tsla['bb_lower'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), fill='tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.05)', name='BB Lower', visible=False), row=1, col=1)

# 4. Volume
fig_tsla.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_tsla['date'], y=df_tsla['volume'], name='Volume', marker=dict(color=colors_tsla, line=dict(width=0)), opacity=1.0, showlegend=False), row=2, col=1)

fig_tsla.update_layout(
    template='plotly_dark', paper_bgcolor='#0c101b', plot_bgcolor='#0c101b', autosize=True, dragmode='pan', margin=dict(t=45, b=40, l=60, r=40),
    xaxis=dict(
        rangeslider=dict(visible=False),
        rangeselector=dict(
            buttons=list([
                dict(count=1, label="1M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=3, label="3M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=6, label="6M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=1, label="1Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=5, label="5Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(step="all", label="MAX")
            ]),
            bgcolor='#141824', activecolor='#2962ff', font=dict(color='#d1d4dc', size=11), bordercolor='#202637', borderwidth=1
        )
    ),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', tickprefix='$', title='Price (USD)', fixedrange=True),
    yaxis2=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', title='Volume', fixedrange=True),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='right', x=1, bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)')
)
fig_tsla.update_xaxes(minallowed='2010-06-15', maxallowed='2026-07-05')
fig_tsla.show(config={'scrollZoom': True})
```

</div>
:::

<hr/>


## Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD)

::: {.column-screen}
<div id="chart-container-amd" class="chart-wrapper">
<div class="chart-toolbar">
<div class="toolbar-left">
<span class="ticker-badge">AMD</span>
<span class="ticker-title">Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.</span>
<span class="divider">|</span>
<div class="indicator-buttons">
<button class="tool-btn active" id="btn-sma-amd" onclick="toggleIndicators('sma', 'amd')">SMA Lines</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-bb-amd" onclick="toggleIndicators('bb', 'amd')">Bollinger Bands</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-all-amd" onclick="toggleIndicators('all', 'amd')">Show All</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-clear-amd" onclick="toggleIndicators('clear', 'amd')">Price Only</button>
</div>
</div>
<button id="fullscreen-btn-amd" onclick="toggleFullscreen('amd')">⛶ Full Screen</button>
</div>

```{python}
#| label: chart-amd
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# Load dataset
df_amd = pd.read_csv("../downloads/amd_enriched.csv")
df_amd['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_amd['date'])

# Create subplots
fig_amd = make_subplots(
    rows=2, cols=1, 
    shared_xaxes=True, 
    vertical_spacing=0.03,
    subplot_titles=('Price & Technical Indicators', 'Volume'),
    row_width=[0.2, 0.8]
)

colors_amd = ['#26a69a' if row['close'] >= row['open'] else '#ef5350' for _, row in df_amd.iterrows()]

# 1. Candlestick
fig_amd.add_trace(
    go.Candlestick(
        x=df_amd['date'], open=df_amd['open'], high=df_amd['high'], low=df_amd['low'], close=df_amd['close'],
        name='AMD Price', increasing_line_color='#26a69a', decreasing_line_color='#ef5350',
        increasing_fillcolor='#26a69a', decreasing_fillcolor='#ef5350', showlegend=True
    ), row=1, col=1
)

# 2. SMAs
fig_amd.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_amd['date'], y=df_amd['sma_20'], line=dict(color='#2962ff', width=1.5), name='SMA 20', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_amd.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_amd['date'], y=df_amd['sma_50'], line=dict(color='#ff9800', width=1.5), name='SMA 50', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_amd.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_amd['date'], y=df_amd['sma_200'], line=dict(color='#e040fb', width=1.5), name='SMA 200', visible=True), row=1, col=1)

# 3. Bollinger Bands
fig_amd.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_amd['date'], y=df_amd['bb_upper'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), name='BB Upper', visible=False), row=1, col=1)
fig_amd.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_amd['date'], y=df_amd['bb_lower'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), fill='tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.05)', name='BB Lower', visible=False), row=1, col=1)

# 4. Volume
fig_amd.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_amd['date'], y=df_amd['volume'], name='Volume', marker=dict(color=colors_amd, line=dict(width=0)), opacity=1.0, showlegend=False), row=2, col=1)

fig_amd.update_layout(
    template='plotly_dark', paper_bgcolor='#0c101b', plot_bgcolor='#0c101b', autosize=True, dragmode='pan', margin=dict(t=45, b=40, l=60, r=40),
    xaxis=dict(
        rangeslider=dict(visible=False),
        rangeselector=dict(
            buttons=list([
                dict(count=1, label="1M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=3, label="3M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=6, label="6M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=1, label="1Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=5, label="5Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(step="all", label="MAX")
            ]),
            bgcolor='#141824', activecolor='#2962ff', font=dict(color='#d1d4dc', size=11), bordercolor='#202637', borderwidth=1
        )
    ),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', tickprefix='$', title='Price (USD)', fixedrange=True),
    yaxis2=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', title='Volume', fixedrange=True),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='right', x=1, bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)')
)
fig_amd.update_xaxes(minallowed='2010-06-15', maxallowed='2026-07-05')
fig_amd.show(config={'scrollZoom': True})
```

</div>
:::

<hr/>


## Netflix, Inc. (NFLX)

::: {.column-screen}
<div id="chart-container-nflx" class="chart-wrapper">
<div class="chart-toolbar">
<div class="toolbar-left">
<span class="ticker-badge">NFLX</span>
<span class="ticker-title">Netflix, Inc.</span>
<span class="divider">|</span>
<div class="indicator-buttons">
<button class="tool-btn active" id="btn-sma-nflx" onclick="toggleIndicators('sma', 'nflx')">SMA Lines</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-bb-nflx" onclick="toggleIndicators('bb', 'nflx')">Bollinger Bands</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-all-nflx" onclick="toggleIndicators('all', 'nflx')">Show All</button>
<button class="tool-btn" id="btn-clear-nflx" onclick="toggleIndicators('clear', 'nflx')">Price Only</button>
</div>
</div>
<button id="fullscreen-btn-nflx" onclick="toggleFullscreen('nflx')">⛶ Full Screen</button>
</div>

```{python}
#| label: chart-nflx
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# Load dataset
df_nflx = pd.read_csv("../downloads/nflx_enriched.csv")
df_nflx['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_nflx['date'])

# Create subplots
fig_nflx = make_subplots(
    rows=2, cols=1, 
    shared_xaxes=True, 
    vertical_spacing=0.03,
    subplot_titles=('Price & Technical Indicators', 'Volume'),
    row_width=[0.2, 0.8]
)

colors_nflx = ['#26a69a' if row['close'] >= row['open'] else '#ef5350' for _, row in df_nflx.iterrows()]

# 1. Candlestick
fig_nflx.add_trace(
    go.Candlestick(
        x=df_nflx['date'], open=df_nflx['open'], high=df_nflx['high'], low=df_nflx['low'], close=df_nflx['close'],
        name='NFLX Price', increasing_line_color='#26a69a', decreasing_line_color='#ef5350',
        increasing_fillcolor='#26a69a', decreasing_fillcolor='#ef5350', showlegend=True
    ), row=1, col=1
)

# 2. SMAs
fig_nflx.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_nflx['date'], y=df_nflx['sma_20'], line=dict(color='#2962ff', width=1.5), name='SMA 20', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_nflx.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_nflx['date'], y=df_nflx['sma_50'], line=dict(color='#ff9800', width=1.5), name='SMA 50', visible=True), row=1, col=1)
fig_nflx.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_nflx['date'], y=df_nflx['sma_200'], line=dict(color='#e040fb', width=1.5), name='SMA 200', visible=True), row=1, col=1)

# 3. Bollinger Bands
fig_nflx.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_nflx['date'], y=df_nflx['bb_upper'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), name='BB Upper', visible=False), row=1, col=1)
fig_nflx.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df_nflx['date'], y=df_nflx['bb_lower'], line=dict(color='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.5)', width=1, dash='dash'), fill='tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(173, 20, 87, 0.05)', name='BB Lower', visible=False), row=1, col=1)

# 4. Volume
fig_nflx.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_nflx['date'], y=df_nflx['volume'], name='Volume', marker=dict(color=colors_nflx, line=dict(width=0)), opacity=1.0, showlegend=False), row=2, col=1)

fig_nflx.update_layout(
    template='plotly_dark', paper_bgcolor='#0c101b', plot_bgcolor='#0c101b', autosize=True, dragmode='pan', margin=dict(t=45, b=40, l=60, r=40),
    xaxis=dict(
        rangeslider=dict(visible=False),
        rangeselector=dict(
            buttons=list([
                dict(count=1, label="1M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=3, label="3M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=6, label="6M", step="month", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=1, label="1Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(count=5, label="5Y", step="year", stepmode="backward"),
                dict(step="all", label="MAX")
            ]),
            bgcolor='#141824', activecolor='#2962ff', font=dict(color='#d1d4dc', size=11), bordercolor='#202637', borderwidth=1
        )
    ),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', tickprefix='$', title='Price (USD)', fixedrange=True),
    yaxis2=dict(gridcolor='#202637', zerolinecolor='#202637', title='Volume', fixedrange=True),
    legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, xanchor='right', x=1, bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)')
)
fig_nflx.update_xaxes(minallowed='2010-06-15', maxallowed='2026-07-05')
fig_nflx.show(config={'scrollZoom': True})
```

</div>
:::

<hr/>

<script>
function toggleFullscreen(symbol) {
  var el = document.getElementById('chart-container-' + symbol);
  el.classList.toggle('fullscreen');
  var btn = document.getElementById('fullscreen-btn-' + symbol);
  if (el.classList.contains('fullscreen')) {
    btn.innerHTML = "🗖 Exit Full Screen";
  } else {
    btn.innerHTML = "⛶ Full Screen";
  }
  // Let Plotly adjust to new size (after transition)
  setTimeout(function() {
    window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize'));
  }, 150);
}

function toggleIndicators(type, symbol) {
  var container = document.getElementById('chart-container-' + symbol);
  var gd = container.querySelector('.plotly-graph-div');
  if (!gd) return;
  
  var buttons = container.querySelectorAll('.indicator-buttons .tool-btn');
  buttons.forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.classList.remove('active');
  });
  
  var activeBtn = document.getElementById('btn-' + type + '-' + symbol);
  if (activeBtn) {
    activeBtn.classList.add('active');
  }
  
  if (type === 'sma') {
    Plotly.restyle(gd, { visible: true }, [1, 2, 3]);
    Plotly.restyle(gd, { visible: false }, [4, 5]);
  } else if (type === 'bb') {
    Plotly.restyle(gd, { visible: false }, [1, 2, 3]);
    Plotly.restyle(gd, { visible: true }, [4, 5]);
  } else if (type === 'all') {
    Plotly.restyle(gd, { visible: true }, [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]);
  } else if (type === 'clear') {
    Plotly.restyle(gd, { visible: false }, [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]);
  }
}
</script>

</body>
